You can only invite users with existing EZCheck.me host account.
If the person you wish to invite still doesn't have an account, please ask her to Sign Up
to the platform first.
edit course - first time title: To get started, please name your first course
edit course - enable ivr tooltip: Feature phone owners will be able to checkin via IVR (Interactive Voice Response)
edit course - enable session start notif: Enable Session Start Notifications. Once the session begins, attendees will receive an App notification to inform them that the session has started and prompt them to check in.
edit course - enable lock dynamic adding: Locking the course will prevent attendees who are not registered to the course to check-in to it.
edit university - subtitle: Please tell us a bit about yourself so we can optimize EZCheck.me for you
session details format: Session ran on {date} and lasted {time} minutes
session-students - location - tip - veri: The Attendee phone location was detected, and it was less than 100 meters from the course location, which means she probably checked-in from the classroom
session-students - location - tip - remo: The Attendee phone location was detected, and it was over 100 meters away from the course location, which means she probably checked-in from a remote location
session-students - location - tip - unde: The Attendee phone location wasn't detected
session-students - location - tip - veri: The Attendee phone location was detected, and it was less than 100 meters from the course location, which means she probably checked-in from the classroom
session-students - location - tip - remo: The Attendee phone location was detected, and it was over 100 meters away from the course location, which means she probably checked-in from a remote location
session-students - location - tip - unde: The Attendee phone location wasn't detected
student-sessions - no student descriptio: Course Attendees can be manually added in the Attendees list
homepage - caption2: At classrooms and online remote meetings
homepage - caption3: End-to-end Check-in solution for universities, schools, webinars and professional training
homepage - checking-in: Are you a student trying to Check-in to a session? Download the App or
homepage - checking-in - pc: Click here to Check-in from your PC
homepage - checking-in - title 1: Are you a student trying to check-in to a session?
homepage - checking-in - title 2: Click here to Check-in from your PC
homepage - checking-in - sms sent: Thank you! The App link is on its way
import report - title: Integrate with external attendees list for course:
import report - text: Upload an Excel attendees list, which contains an Email addresses column, and we will add the number of check-ins for each recognized student on that list, so you could import it back to your LMS platform.
import report error - email column not f: Email column not found - please check and upload a different Excel file
download report - gateway - upload excel: Integrate your attendance data into an existing attendees list.
You will need to upload an Excel attendees list, which contains an Email addresses column of your attendees. The number of check-ins for each recognized student will be added to that list.
download report - gateway - download exc: Download a full attendance report, with highly detailed sessions and check-in data of each session and attendee.
signup -gateway - i am a student - text: I participate in a course and I need to check-in
signup -gateway - i am a host - text: I am running a course and I need to track my student’s attendance
first-time - text1: Before running your first Check-in Session, it is recommended to watch this short tutorial:
first-time - text2: Before running your first check-in session, we suggest asking your attendees to download the EZCheck.me App for {apple|IPHONE|iPhone} or {android|ANDROID|Android}.
first-time - text3.1: Attendees can also Check-in to your sessions without the App at
first-time - text3.2: , but the usage will be easier and safer with it.
first-time - text4: {share|Send your attendees a link |target}  to download the App.
first-time - text5: Important: The session screen MUST BE VISIBLE to the attendees in order for them to check-in!
first-time - text6: In online meeting, share your screen. In classroom, use a projector.
first-time - mail subject: Please download the EZCheck.me App before our first session
first-time - mail body:
Hi all, 

We will be using the EZCheck.me App to check-in to the course sessions.

Please download and install the App BEFORE THE FIRST SESSION, so you can check-in easily.

Download for iPhone
{IPHONE}

Download for Android
{ANDROID}

Thanks
start-session - use geofencing info: When Geolocation is on, the attendee’s location is detected and compared with the course location, so you can tell if they checked-in from the campus or from a remote location
start-session - enable icon quiz info: Disable the icon quiz check-in method for a more secured check-in. The attendees will have to check-in using the EZCheck.me App, with QR scan only (web check-in will be disabled)
start-session - blocked popup message -: Please allow us to run pop-up windows :-)
Oh no! Your Session pop-up window was blocked by your browser.
Please allow us to run pop-up windows.
After enabling pop ups, please run your session again
manual-checkin late checkin-title: {student} asked for late check-in to this session on {date}

confirm-delete-session body: Are you sure you want to delete course "{session}"?
confirm-delete-session-multiple body: Are you sure you want to delete {session_count} sessions?
pricing table - premium account required: This feature isn't included in your current plan. Please upgrade your account to access it.
pricing table - institutional account re: This feature is part of the Institutional plan. Please upgrade your account to access it.
download excel teaser dialog - bullet 1: Detailed Excel reports of each course, session and attendee
download excel teaser dialog - bullet 2: Geolocation - ideal for in-class / online hybrid courses
download excel teaser dialog - bullet 3: Branded sessions with the organization’s logo and colors
download excel teaser dialog - bullet 7: Insightful dashboard and stats about each attendee

session popup - scan the code or go to: Scan the code, or go to

mobile - home - download text: Checking-in is easier with the App!
mobile - home - download incentive 2: Track your attendance history in each course
mobile - home - create link body:
To create your own EZCheck.me check-in sessions, go to the following link on your desktop PC:

https://ezcheck.me
mobile - signup - signup - 0: How would you like to check-in?
mobile - signup - signup - 1: To Check-in, please fill in your details:
mobile - signup - phone number disclaime: You phone number will be used for identification only.
Only the last 4 digits be visible to the courses instructor(s).
mobile - signup - form social identity: Use a social identity provider instead
mobile - signup - fill in the code: We sent a verification code to PHONE_NUMBER. Please fill it in:
mobile - signup - error - An account wit: An account with the given email already exists
mobile - signup - error - Attendee with: Attendee with this email already exists
Attendee with this phone already exists
mobile - signup - code sent: You should receive the code via text message shortly
mobile - signup - voice sent: You should receive a phone call with the code shortly
mobile - quiz - instructions:
Tap the icon that currently
appears on the large screen
mobile - checkedin: You have already checked-in to this session
mobile - locked: You cannot check-in to this session
mobile - course_locked: You cannot check in because you’re not listed in this course. Please contact your instructor.
mobile - home - click to popup again: Click here to pop it out again
mobile app - alert - something went wron: Something went wrong, please try again later
mobile app - error - enter sms code: Please enter the code we sent you via sms
mobile app - signup - toc - description: Please review and agree to EZCheck.me Terms and Condition and Privacy Policy
mobile app - history - my rate: My attendance rate for this course:
setup location - description:
When running a Check-in session, you may use Geolocation.
When Geolocation is on, the attendee’s location is detected, so you can tell if they checked-in from the classroom or from a remote location.
setup location - map explain: Use the map to search and set your course location:
setup location - map explain bottom: Search or click the map to set a location
dashboard - course attendance - tooltip: Here you can view your overall course attendance rate, and the latest session attendance rate
dashboard - sessions attendance graph -: This graph shows you the attendance rate trend of your course over time
dashboard - attendees attendance - toolt: Your course attendees, sorted by attendance rate
dashboard - sequential absent sessions -: This list shows attendees who missed past sessions. Future sessions are excluded, and the list is sorted by severity, with the most absences at the top.
dashboard - teasing 1: You’re missing out some valuable data!
Scan the Code to Self Check-in: Scan the Code to Self Check-in
post checkin url - description: This message will be shown to your attendees in the App once they check in. You may also include a clickable link (URL).
